question_text: Name two practical applications of electromagnets and explain why an electromagnet is better than a permanent magnet for each application.
correct_answer: Examples: (1) Doorbells - electromagnet turns on only when needed; (2) Scrapyard crane - can pick up and release metal by switching on/off; (3) Electric motors - strength can be controlled. Any two with explanations about on/off control or adjustable strength are correct.
explanation: Electromagnets are useful wherever you need to turn magnetism on and off, or control its strength. Permanent magnets cannot do this, so electromagnets are essential for many modern devices.
